markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review sprint client progress and align on value creation strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/qvHxTTzyV3mofZGRF75sCB9cSTV9KR8_?tab=summary&timestamp=82.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Indexing is a critical blocker.** Cresta (3/11 articles indexed) and Ramp (12/30) face severe indexing issues, jeopardizing sprint success and conversion.](https://fathom.video/share/qvHxTTzyV3mofZGRF75sCB9cSTV9KR8_?tab=summary&timestamp=248.0)
  - [**Brex sets a new quality bar.** Client John, a full-stack marketer, demands rigorous SEO (e.g., keyword-driven internal linking) and unique "information gain" to avoid generic AI content.](https://fathom.video/share/qvHxTTzyV3mofZGRF75sCB9cSTV9KR8_?tab=summary&timestamp=1282.0)
  - [**Check That is the new value driver.** The proprietary AEO tool replaces Scrunch, enabling early "wow moments" (Week 2) and positioning GrowthX as a tech-driven expert, not just an agency.](https://fathom.video/share/qvHxTTzyV3mofZGRF75sCB9cSTV9KR8_?tab=summary&timestamp=2023.0)
  - [**Proactive value framing is essential.** To justify premium pricing, teams must articulate value beyond content production by tying work to client outcomes and listening for signals of external pressure.](https://fathom.video/share/qvHxTTzyV3mofZGRF75sCB9cSTV9KR8_?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)

## Topics

### Client Progress & Challenges

  - [**Cresta (Week 8):**](https://fathom.video/share/qvHxTTzyV3mofZGRF75sCB9cSTV9KR8_?tab=summary&timestamp=246.0)
      - [**Problem:** Severe indexing failure → 3 of 11 new articles indexed.](https://fathom.video/share/qvHxTTzyV3mofZGRF75sCB9cSTV9KR8_?tab=summary&timestamp=288.0)
      - [**Hypothesis:** The `robots.txt` file is configured to index everything, potentially hurting the crawl budget.](https://fathom.video/share/qvHxTTzyV3mofZGRF75sCB9cSTV9KR8_?tab=summary&timestamp=263.0)
      - [**Risk:** Jeopardizes conversion decision at sprint end.](https://fathom.video/share/qvHxTTzyV3mofZGRF75sCB9cSTV9KR8_?tab=summary&timestamp=340.0)
  - [**Ramp (Week 8):**](https://fathom.video/share/qvHxTTzyV3mofZGRF75sCB9cSTV9KR8_?tab=summary&timestamp=501.0)
      - [**Problem:** Indexing failure → 12 of \~30 articles indexed.](https://fathom.video/share/qvHxTTzyV3mofZGRF75sCB9cSTV9KR8_?tab=summary&timestamp=513.0)
      - [**Actions:**](https://fathom.video/share/qvHxTTzyV3mofZGRF75sCB9cSTV9KR8_?tab=summary&timestamp=513.0)
          - [Fixed `robots.txt` to allow AI crawlers.](https://fathom.video/share/qvHxTTzyV3mofZGRF75sCB9cSTV9KR8_?tab=summary&timestamp=513.0)
          - [Improving internal linking on older articles.](https://fathom.video/share/qvHxTTzyV3mofZGRF75sCB9cSTV9KR8_?tab=summary&timestamp=599.0)
      - [**Value Framing:** Progress is tied to AI search visibility, with articles already appearing in AI overviews.](https://fathom.video/share/qvHxTTzyV3mofZGRF75sCB9cSTV9KR8_?tab=summary&timestamp=744.0)
  - [**Nivon (Week 8):**](https://fathom.video/share/qvHxTTzyV3mofZGRF75sCB9cSTV9KR8_?tab=summary&timestamp=100.0)
      - [Content is now publishing, but the client's legal team must review competitor comparisons.](https://fathom.video/share/qvHxTTzyV3mofZGRF75sCB9cSTV9KR8_?tab=summary&timestamp=107.0)
      - [Key decision-maker Nima has missed recent calls, requiring a follow-up.](https://fathom.video/share/qvHxTTzyV3mofZGRF75sCB9cSTV9KR8_?tab=summary&timestamp=173.0)
  - [**Turnstile:**](https://fathom.video/share/qvHxTTzyV3mofZGRF75sCB9cSTV9KR8_?tab=summary&timestamp=3580.0)
      - [Quality challenges persist. William and Ife are working to elevate the 7 created pieces to the required standard.](https://fathom.video/share/qvHxTTzyV3mofZGRF75sCB9cSTV9KR8_?tab=summary&timestamp=3582.0)

### Brex: A New Standard for Quality

  - [Client John, a full-stack marketer, sets a high bar for content quality and rigor.](https://fathom.video/share/qvHxTTzyV3mofZGRF75sCB9cSTV9KR8_?tab=summary&timestamp=1282.0)
  - [**Key Feedback & Requirements:**](https://fathom.video/share/qvHxTTzyV3mofZGRF75sCB9cSTV9KR8_?tab=summary&timestamp=1282.0)
      - [**Internal Linking:** Every link must be keyword-driven. John spends 30–40 mins/article just on link review.](https://fathom.video/share/qvHxTTzyV3mofZGRF75sCB9cSTV9KR8_?tab=summary&timestamp=1325.0)
      - [**Information Gain:** Content must offer unique insights (e.g., case studies, proprietary data) to avoid generic AI patterns.](https://fathom.video/share/qvHxTTzyV3mofZGRF75sCB9cSTV9KR8_?tab=summary&timestamp=1449.0)
      - [**AI Patterns:** Avoid obvious AI signals like repetitive phrasing or single-paragraph H3 sections.](https://fathom.video/share/qvHxTTzyV3mofZGRF75sCB9cSTV9KR8_?tab=summary&timestamp=1512.0)
  - [**Strategic Challenge:** Justify the $40k/mo fee beyond content production.](https://fathom.video/share/qvHxTTzyV3mofZGRF75sCB9cSTV9KR8_?tab=summary&timestamp=1582.0)
      - [**Goal:** Position GrowthX as John's "superpower" → an expert partner he can learn from, not just a content engine.](https://fathom.video/share/qvHxTTzyV3mofZGRF75sCB9cSTV9KR8_?tab=summary&timestamp=1810.0)

### Check That: The New Value Driver

  - [Jason Gong demoed **Check That**, the proprietary AEO (Answer Engine Optimization) tool replacing Scrunch.](https://fathom.video/share/qvHxTTzyV3mofZGRF75sCB9cSTV9KR8_?tab=summary&timestamp=2023.0)
  - [**Value Proposition:**](https://fathom.video/share/qvHxTTzyV3mofZGRF75sCB9cSTV9KR8_?tab=summary&timestamp=2280.0)
      - [**Proprietary Data:** Access to a public index of high-value prompts, saving clients the cost of tracking them.](https://fathom.video/share/qvHxTTzyV3mofZGRF75sCB9cSTV9KR8_?tab=summary&timestamp=2280.0)
      - [**Platform Integration:** Deeply coupled with GrowthX's content creation and optimization platform.](https://fathom.video/share/qvHxTTzyV3mofZGRF75sCB9cSTV9KR8_?tab=summary&timestamp=2325.0)
  - [**Rollout Plan:**](https://fathom.video/share/qvHxTTzyV3mofZGRF75sCB9cSTV9KR8_?tab=summary&timestamp=2351.0)
      - [**This Week:** Onboard existing Scrunch clients; provide training materials.](https://fathom.video/share/qvHxTTzyV3mofZGRF75sCB9cSTV9KR8_?tab=summary&timestamp=2351.0)
      - [**End of Jan:** Full launch to all teams.](https://fathom.video/share/qvHxTTzyV3mofZGRF75sCB9cSTV9KR8_?tab=summary&timestamp=2351.0)
  - [**Feedback & Support:**](https://fathom.video/share/qvHxTTzyV3mofZGRF75sCB9cSTV9KR8_?tab=summary&timestamp=2691.0)
      - **Quick Feedback:** `#ask-check-that` Slack channel.
      - [**UI/Feature Requests:** Linear board (link to be shared).](https://fathom.video/share/qvHxTTzyV3mofZGRF75sCB9cSTV9KR8_?tab=summary&timestamp=2691.0)
      - [**Process:** EMs own Check That setup. Ada will document a process, and Jason will lead a live setup session with Kathy for BlackSol.](https://fathom.video/share/qvHxTTzyV3mofZGRF75sCB9cSTV9KR8_?tab=summary&timestamp=3098.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Aida:**](https://fathom.video/share/qvHxTTzyV3mofZGRF75sCB9cSTV9KR8_?tab=summary&timestamp=1879.0)

      - [Document the Check That setup process for sprint teams.](https://fathom.video/share/qvHxTTzyV3mofZGRF75sCB9cSTV9KR8_?tab=summary&timestamp=3362.0)
  - [**Jason:**](https://fathom.video/share/qvHxTTzyV3mofZGRF75sCB9cSTV9KR8_?tab=summary&timestamp=2691.0)
      - [Share the AEO hub link and Linear board in the strategy channel.](https://fathom.video/share/qvHxTTzyV3mofZGRF75sCB9cSTV9KR8_?tab=summary&timestamp=2691.0)
      - [Schedule a live Check That setup session with Kathy for BlackSol.](https://fathom.video/share/qvHxTTzyV3mofZGRF75sCB9cSTV9KR8_?tab=summary&timestamp=3498.0)
  - [**Ella & Andi:**](https://fathom.video/share/qvHxTTzyV3mofZGRF75sCB9cSTV9KR8_?tab=summary&timestamp=3222.0)
      - [Formalize the process for setting up Check That for prospects with Tyler.](https://fathom.video/share/qvHxTTzyV3mofZGRF75sCB9cSTV9KR8_?tab=summary&timestamp=3222.0)
  - [**William, George, & Aida:**](https://fathom.video/share/qvHxTTzyV3mofZGRF75sCB9cSTV9KR8_?tab=summary&timestamp=1879.0)
      - [Plan the strategic conversation with Brex to frame long-term value.](https://fathom.video/share/qvHxTTzyV3mofZGRF75sCB9cSTV9KR8_?tab=summary&timestamp=1836.0)
  - [**All EMs:**](https://fathom.video/share/qvHxTTzyV3mofZGRF75sCB9cSTV9KR8_?tab=summary&timestamp=2908.0)
      - Request Check That access in `#ask-check-that` and begin onboarding clients.
